source_todos.decision_rule: Use mcp-lifecycle-2025-11-25 for lifecycle/architecture claims.
Use mcp-resources-2025-11-25 for resources claims.
Use mcp-prompts-2025-11-25 for prompts claims.
Use mcp-server-versioning for published-server registry metadata claims.
Use registry about, moderation-policy, or aggregator keys depending on the claim.
Use product-specific token-reduction evidence only as vendor-reported unless independent corroboration is added.
Add broader representative sampling or keep discourse claims scoped to named examples.
Use only issue-level evidence from registry/private-registry/discoverability sources; do not restore the rejected GitHub issue #1683 reading.
Treat single-issue context-bloat evidence as configuration-specific unless reproduced or broadened.
Use accepted vendor-adoption notes for broad adoption claims, not this discourse file.
Current accepted alternatives notes have BibTeX-backed keys.
Use semantic-kernel-plugins-2024-12-10 and semantic-kernel-overview-2024-06-24.
Use openai-using-tools with caveats about Skills/MCP separation evidence.
Use GOV.UK open-standards evidence as the public-sector portability baseline; keep direct framework-vs-MCP comparison analysis-grade.
Use NCSC/NIST app approval and vetting evidence only as a local-control baseline; do not claim AI connector marketplace procurement readiness.
BibTeX now exists for GOV.UK open standards, NCSC third-party app guidance, and NIST SP 800-163r1.
Use independent preprints for ecosystem and production-readiness evidence only; do not claim audited vendor product adoption or public-sector deployment metrics.
Use recovered exact URLs; keep unrecovered Google Cloud Assist title caveated or remove it.
Do not make foundation governance/process claims beyond recovered donation and launch evidence.
Use vendor control evidence conditionally by product path; keep SLA, incident, UK/EU public-sector terms, retention, strict enforcement, and independent assurance as residual gaps.
Treat incorporation history as FastMCP project/maintainer-reported unless official historical confirmation is found.
Use recovered PyPI, GitHub release, FastMCP 3.0, Code Mode, 2.10, Apps, and repository/adoption leads.
Treat 2026-04-13 local snippet as a timezone/display artifact for the 2026-04-14 release.
Treat FastMCP conformance as project-reported unless independent tests or certification are found.
Treat stars, forks, downloads, and maintainer posts as popularity signals, not production adoption.
